requirements.summary: Create task submission interface for natural language instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Users can enter natural language instructions for tasks
Interface provides clear feedback on instruction submission

file_operations.description: Create task submission form component with textarea for natural language instructions, task type selector dropdown (maintenance, bugFix, featureRequest, optimization), validation logic for non-empty descriptions, and submit button. Use shadcn-ui components (Button, Textarea, Select, Label). Call backend's createTask method via HTTP. Display loading state during submission and success/error messages.

Create custom hook that manages task submission state (loading, error, success), validates input (minimum length, non-empty), calls backend createTask method with description and taskType, handles response and error states, and returns submission function and state.
Create page component that renders TaskSubmissionForm, displays page title and instructions, shows submission feedback messages, and provides navigation back to dashboard after successful submission.
Register route for SubmitTaskPage at path '/submit' in React Router configuration. Ensure route is accessible and wired into navigation.

requirements.summary: Build task dashboard displaying tasks, status, and results in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows list of all tasks with status indicators
Users can view detailed results for completed tasks
Interface updates automatically when task status changes
Performance metrics display execution speed for each task

file_operations.description: Create task card component displaying task ID, description, task type, status badge (color-coded: pending=yellow, inProgress=blue, completed=green, failed=red), priority indicator, attempt count, and expandable results section for completed tasks. Use shadcn-ui Card, Badge, and Collapsible components. Include timestamp display and performance metrics when available.

Create task list component that renders grid/list of TaskCard components, includes filtering by status and task type, sorting options (by priority, date, status), empty state when no tasks exist, and loading skeleton. Use shadcn-ui components (Skeleton, Select for filters, Tabs for status views).

Create custom hook that polls backend for task updates at configurable intervals (default 3 seconds), fetches task details using getTask method, tracks task status changes, manages polling lifecycle (start/stop), and returns current tasks array and loading state. Implement automatic refresh when tasks are in inProgress or pending status.

Create dashboard page component that uses useTaskPolling hook to fetch and display tasks, renders TaskList component with real-time updates, shows summary statistics (total tasks, completed, pending, failed counts), includes navigation to submit task page, and displays performance overview section with average execution time metrics.

Create modal component for detailed task view, displaying full task information including description, status history, result details, attempt count, task type, priority, and timestamps. Use shadcn-ui Dialog component. Include actions like refresh status and close modal. Wire this modal to open when TaskCard is clicked.
Register route for DashboardPage at path '/' as the default route in React Router configuration. Ensure route is accessible and set as the landing page.

requirements.summary: Design cohesive botanical theme with organic flowing layouts
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses botanical-inspired colors throughout the application
Typography and spacing create a modern, organic feel
Layout elements use smooth, natural flowing patterns
Visual style is consistent across all pages and components

file_operations.description: Update global styles with botanical color palette as CSS custom properties: primary greens (#2D5016, #4A7C2C, #6B9D4D), accent purples (#7B2D7A, #9B4D99, #C17FBF), warm earth tones (#8B6F47, #A68A64, #C4A882), and neutral backgrounds. Add organic flowing animations, smooth transitions, rounded corners with natural curves, and shadow definitions for depth. Configure font families for modern organic typography.

Extend Tailwind theme with botanical color palette (flowerGreen, botanicalPurple, earthWarm shades), custom rounded values for organic shapes, custom spacing scale, smooth animation curves, and gradient definitions. Add custom utilities for flowing borders and organic shadows that reflect natural growth patterns.

Create layout wrapper component with botanical-themed header containing the flower logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/flower-logo.dim_256x256.png and navigation menu, organic flowing background patterns, smooth page transitions, and consistent spacing. Apply botanical color scheme and ensure responsive design with natural flow breakpoints. Wire Navigation component into this layout.

Create navigation component with links to Dashboard and Submit Task pages, active route highlighting using botanical colors, responsive mobile menu, and smooth hover transitions. Use shadcn-ui components (NavigationMenu). This will be wired into Layout component.

Create hero section component displaying welcome message, app tagline about AI-powered task automation, and call-to-action button to submit tasks. Use the generated hero background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png as background with subtle botanical patterns. Apply organic flowing layout with smooth animations.
Wrap all routes with Layout component to apply consistent botanical theme across the application. Add HeroSection component to the DashboardPage route to provide branded landing experience.
